transport_evidence.code: api.runtime.subagent.run({ sessionKey, message: prompt, lane: 'subagent', deliver: false, expectsCompletionMessage: true, ... })

subagent_ended.usage: FALLBACK recovery when main path (waitForRun) fails or times out
subagent_ended.deferral: Completion-mode subagent_ended deferred until announce delivery resolves - empathy's deliver: false eliminates this

findings.timeout_handling: Defers to subagent_ended hook via cleanupState(..., false), does NOT false-complete
findings.cleanup_idempotency: Protected via completedSessions TTL map (5 minutes)

openclaw_assumptions.completion_mode_deferred: subagent_ended for completion-mode deferred until announce delivery resolves - empathy uses deliver: false so NOT affected
openclaw_assumptions.session_mode_never_emits: subagent_ended NEVER emitted for session-mode - empathy uses completion mode so NOT affected
openclaw_assumptions.deliver_false_affects_deferral: deliver: false means no announce delivery, completion-mode subagent_ended fires promptly

hypotheses.empathy_has_unverified_openclaw_hook_ass: SUPPORTED - Cross-repo verification from reviewer B confirms session-mode never emits subagent_ended, completion-mode deferred, fire-and-forget
hypotheses.empathy_timeout_leads_to_false_completio: REFUTED - Timeout path calls cleanupState(..., false) preserving activeRuns entry for fallback
hypotheses.empathy_cleanup_not_idempotent: REFUTED - completedSessions TTL map (5-min window) at L92-104 provides dedupe
hypotheses.empathy_lacks_dedupe_key: SUPPORTED - idempotencyKey uses Date.now() (L198) which is not stable for retries

open_risks.risk: subagent_ended hook not guaranteed by OpenClaw (fire-and-forget, errors swallowed)
open_risks.mitigation: TTL-based expiration in isActive() allows parent session recovery after 5 minutes

open_risks.risk: Completion-mode subagent_ended deferred until announce delivery resolves
open_risks.mitigation: empathy uses deliver: false, so no announce delivery needed - fires promptly
empathy uses expectsCompletionMessage: true (completion-mode), so this doesn't apply

open_risks.risk: idempotencyKey uses Date.now() - not stable for retries
open_risks.mitigation: New workflow helper should use stable dedupe key based on parentSessionId only

key_insight: Empathy observer is CORRECTLY configured: deliver: false + expectsCompletionMessage: true = completion mode WITHOUT announce deferral. This ensures subagent_ended fires promptly.
